items.name: Pixel Coqui Shoulder Pet
items.description:
Coquí 🐸
This tiny frog is a national symbol of Puerto Rico! It’s famous for its cute nighttime song — “co-quí!” 🌙 The coquí represents island pride, nature, and the warm sound of home. Wear or show it proudly and bring a little piece of Puerto Rican spirit wherever you go! 🇵🇷💚
